title: taraxacum rubro-lineatum
intro: Taraxacum rubro-lineatum, also known as red veined dandelion or red stem dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids, terpenoids, and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, inflammation, and infections, due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Taraxacum rubro-lineatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as to support liver and kidney health.
